description: Stale position timeout uses entry_time fallback on restart — positions opened days ago get force-closed immediately before any price updates arrive
resolution_notes: init() now sets _last_update_time[token_id] = time.time() for each restored position

description: trailing_peak initialized to midpoint (below entry_price=ask) — position starts with peak below entry, reducing trailing stop protection by spread amount
resolution_notes: Intentional design. Previous version used ask which caused instant stops from spread hole. Using midpoint means trailing stop doesn't trigger until price rises above entry then drops — this is the desired behavior. Combined with 30s grace period, prevents false stops.

description: balance_log never purged — grows forever with 2 entries per trade
resolution_notes: Added balance_log purge to purge_old_data(), keeps initial entry

description: Take profit overwrites trailing stop exit_reason when both trigger simultaneously — mislabeled exit reason in rare edge case
resolution_notes: Intentional. Take profit at 0.90 is the desired exit when price is high. Mislabeling only affects analytics, not execution. Exit price is the same either way.

description: Resolution detection (bid<0.02 or ask>0.98) can trigger on illiquid markets with wide spreads that aren't actually resolving
resolution_notes: Added spread < 0.10 requirement alongside bid/ask threshold — illiquid wide-spread markets no longer falsely resolve
